lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕਰੈ ਧੰਨੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin kee sevaa dharam raae karai dhan savaaranahaar |2|
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma serves them; blessed is the Lord who adorns them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੇ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮਨਹਿ ਤਜੈ ਮਨਿ ਚੂਕੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: man ke bikaar maneh tajai man chookai mohu abhimaan |
lines.english: One who eliminates mental wickedness from within the mind, and casts out emotional attachment and egotistical pride,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਦਿਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur mukat na paaeeai manamukh firai divaan |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the self-willed manmukhs do not find liberation; they wander around like lunatics.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aatam raam pachhaaniaa sahaje naam samaan |
lines.english: comes to recognize the All-pervading Soul, and is intuitively absorbed into the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੈ ਕਥਨੀ ਬਦਨੀ ਕਰੇ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabad na cheenai kathanee badanee kare bikhiaa maeh samaan |3|
lines.english: They do not contemplate the Shabad; engrossed in corruption, they utter only empty words. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap hai doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: He Himself is everything; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬੋਲਾਏ ਤਿਉ ਬੋਲੀਐ ਜਾ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਲਾਏ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bolaae tiau boleeai jaa aap bulaae soe |
lines.english: I speak just as He makes me speak, when He Himself makes me speak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh baanee braham hai sabad milaavaa hoe |
lines.english: The Word of the Gurmukh is God Himself. Through the Shabad, we merge in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਤੂ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੩੦॥੬੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal too jit seviai sukh hoe |4|30|63|
lines.english: O Nanak, remember the Naam; serving Him, peace is obtained. ||4||30||63||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਧੋਤੀ ਕਿਵੈ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜੇ ਸਉ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mal haumai dhotee kivai na utarai je sau teerath naae |
lines.english: This filth of egotism cannot be washed away, even by taking cleansing baths at hundreds of sacred shrines.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jag haumai mail dukh paaeaa mal laagee doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The world is polluted with the filth of egotism, suffering in pain. This filth sticks to them because of their love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿਐ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਪੂਛਹੁ ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: parriai mail na utarai poochhahu giaaneea jaae |1|
lines.english: This filth is not removed by studying. Go ahead, and ask the wise ones. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਦੂਣੀ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: bahu bidh karam kamaavade doonee mal laagee aae |
lines.english: Performing all sorts of rituals, people are smeared with twice as much filth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere gur saran aavai taa niramal hoe |
lines.english: O my mind, coming to the Sanctuary of the Guru, you shall become immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਥਕੇ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਸਕੀ ਧੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh har har kar thake mail na sakee dhoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs have grown weary of chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, but their filth cannot be removed. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੈਲੇ ਮੈਲੇ ਮੁਏ ਜਾਸਨਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maile maile mue jaasan pat gavaae |
lines.english: The filthy, self-willed manmukhs die in filth, and they depart in disgrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਮੈਲੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mailai bhagat na hovee naam na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: With a polluted mind, devotional service cannot be performed, and the Naam, the Name of the Lord, cannot be obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਅੰਧੇਰੈ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਬਾਲੀਐ ਤਿਉ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਤਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau andherai deepak baaleeai tiau gur giaan agiaan tajaae |2|
lines.english: Like a lamp lit in the darkness, the spiritual wisdom of the Guru dispels ignorance. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasai mal haumai jaae samaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Lord comes to abide in the mind, and the filth of egotism is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਕੀਆ ਹਮ ਕਰਹਗੇ ਹਮ ਮੂਰਖ ਗਾਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ham keea ham karahage ham moorakh gaavaar |
lines.english: "I have done this, and I will do that" - I am an idiotic fool for saying this!

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramatee sukh paaeeai sach naam ur dhaar |3|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, peace is found, with the True Name enshrined in the heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੈ ਵਾਲਾ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karanai vaalaa visariaa doojai bhaae piaar |
lines.english: I have forgotten the Doer of all; I am caught in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਸਭਿ ਭਵਿ ਥਕੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa jevadd dukh nahee sabh bhav thake sansaar |
lines.english: There is no pain as great as the pain of Maya; it drives people to wander all around the world, until they become exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਜ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: e man bhagatee ratiaa sach baanee nij thaau |
lines.english: This mind is attuned to devotional worship; through the True Word of Gurbani, it finds its own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis no mele so milai hau tis balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who meet and merge with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਸਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੪॥੩੧॥੬੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai sache maeh samaau |4|31|64|
lines.english: O Nanak, never forget the Naam; immerse yourself in the True One. ||4||31||64||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਰਤੇ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਰਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਚੇ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man rate jihavaa ratee har gun sache gaau |
lines.english: With the mind so imbued, and the tongue imbued as well, sing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਿਰਹੁ ਅਤਿ ਅਗਲਾ ਕਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mai man tan birahu at agalaa kiau preetam milai ghar aae |
lines.english: Within my mind and body is the intense pain of separation; how can my Beloved come to meet me in my home?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਦੇਖਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਦੇਖਿਐ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa dekhaa prabh aapanaa prabh dekhiai dukh jaae |
lines.english: When I see my God, seeing God Himself, my pain is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਇ ਪੁਛਾ ਤਿਨ ਸਜਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaae puchhaa tin sajanaa prabh kit bidh milai milaae |1|
lines.english: I go and ask my friends, "How can I meet and merge with God?" ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਾ ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere satiguraa mai tujh bin avar na koe |
lines.english: O my True Guru, without You I have no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ham moorakh mugadh saranaagatee kar kirapaa mele har soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am foolish and ignorant; I seek Your Sanctuary. Please be Merciful and unite me with the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur har prabh bujhiaa gur jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: The True Guru understands the Lord God. There is no other as Great as the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa har naam kaa prabh aap milaavai soe |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of the Name of the Lord. God Himself causes us to meet Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਉਪਾਵ ਥਕੇ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth kinai na paaeaa kar upaav thake sabh koe |
lines.english: No one has found Him by stubborn-mindedness. All have grown weary of the effort.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਢਹਿ ਪਵਾ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਮੇਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau gur saranaaee dteh pavaa kar deaa mele prabh soe |2|
lines.english: I have come and collapsed in the Guru's Sanctuary. In His Kindness, He has united me with God. ||2||
